description: A hog farmer uses smart feeders that record how much each individual pig eats. They want to identify pigs that are not eating enough.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the daily feed intake data for all pigs in a specific pen.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent gets the feed consumption data for each pig.

nodes.task_description: Calculate the average feed intake for the pen.
Identify any pigs whose feed intake is significantly below the pen average for the last 3 days.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent generates a list of 5 pigs that are potential health concerns.

nodes.task_description: Create a task for the manager to check on the flagged pigs.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent creates a task in the management system.
